The Problem

Athletes Carry Too Many Devices

Constantly switching between devices creates distractions, interrupts focus, and reduces performance.

✕
Smartphone
Navigation & route tracking
✕
Smartwatch
Workout tracking & heart rate
✕
Earbuds
Music & audio guidance
✕
Sunglasses
UV protection & visibility
The Solution

One Device. One Experience.

FVision replaces every device you wear — combining HUD, GPS, audio, health monitoring, and gesture control into one platform.

01
👁
Smart HUD Display

Real-time data projected directly into your field of view. No need to look down.

02
👉
Gesture Control

AI-powered hand gesture recognition for completely touch-free interaction.

03
📍
GPS Navigation

Turn-by-turn directions delivered via your smartphone Bluetooth connection.

04
❤
Health Monitoring

Continuous heart rate, calories, pace, and performance metrics in real time.

05
🎧
Open-Ear Audio

High-quality directional audio while maintaining full environmental awareness.

06
🛡
UV Protection

Premium polarized UV400 lenses with anti-glare for all-day outdoor comfort.

Technical Specifications

Built For Serious Athletes

Display
HUD TechnologyMicro-OLED Waveguide
Refresh Rate60Hz / 5ms Latency
LensUV400 Polarized Anti-glare
Sensors & Connectivity
Heart RatePPG Sensor (inner frame)
CameraHD Vision Sensor (AI Gesture)
Bluetooth5.2 — 10m range
GPSVia smartphone tethering
Audio & Controls
SpeakersOpen-ear directional x2
MicrophoneDual mic (noise cancel)
Touch StripCapacitive temple control
Gestures5 AI-recognized gestures
Physical
Battery8–10 hours continuous
ChargingUSB-C, 1.5h full charge
Weight~42g
Water ResistanceIPX4
